title: Project Programmer Art
description: The classic look of minecraft… with my style!
body:
Just another Programmer Art resource pack

This pack takes on the style of Release 1.0 Minecraft, adding some new things and qol (also some easter eggs)

If you like some of these ideas feel free to use them!

## Recommended to use Programmer Art Continuation Project!!
![Place Project Programmer Art above Your Programmer Art Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef9dba3a15ec865210fe9a9d622ef4dab04ede58.png)
